summary: A recorded news clip, posted as a repost, carrying a 'FOX NEWS channel' logo and a 'STATE OF THE UNION ADDRESS' chyron with a clock readout. The sampled frames show people seated in a gallery, including a woman with blonde hair and a woman in a dark patterned top who appears tearful, then cut to a man with light hair in a dark suit and red tie speaking at a microphone in a legislative chamber with two men seated behind him. The footage is broadcast coverage.

script.scene: Gallery attendees seated together, including a blonde woman and a woman in a dark patterned top with head lowered; Fox News logo and 'STATE OF THE UNION ADDRESS' chyron.
A man in a dark suit and red tie speaks at a microphone in a legislative chamber, two men seated behind him, under the same chyron.

notable_text: FOX NEWS channel; STATE OF THE UNION ADDRESS
